mapDescription: The number of total racks in the battery section e.g.) 0x000B → 11ea
Accepted request(Conroller → BSC 40010) will be written while the request ack.(30030) is In Progress(0x0001) or Done(0x0002) If the request is not accepted or turn to None (in 30030), this value will
The value of this continually cycles from 0(zero) to 65535 with an interval of 1second.
Read the BSC operation manual for more information.
The number of racks which can be charged or discharged e.g.) 0x000B → 11ea
System SOC calculated based on online racks e.g.) 0x20DA → 8410 * 0.01 = 84.10%
The average SOH of all the online racks e.g.) 0x20DA → 8410 * 0.01 = 84.10%

mapName: Anticipated BSC DC Voltage (when there is no online rack)
mapDescription: The anticipated BSC DC voltage, after racks’ contactors are closed e.g.) 0x0072 C14D → 7520589 * 0.0001 = 752.0589V
The average of voltage of all the online racks
Total amount of DC current in the battery section
The maximum power allowed to charge the battery section e.g.) 0x0001 1BC1 → 72641 * 0.001 = 72.641kW
The maximum power allowed to discharge the battery section e.g.) 0x0001 1BC1 → 72641 * 0.001 = 72.641kW
The highest SOC (among online racks) e.g.) 0x20DA → 8410 * 0.01 = 84.10%

mapName: Rack Location of Min SOC (among online racks)
mapDescription: The rack location that has the lowest SOC (among online racks)

mapDescription: The number of online rack that require recalibration.
